name: Obby Roads
author: Poki
description: Obby Roads is a wild online game that mixes driving, racing, and parkour into one thrilling adventure! Jump over obstacles, stay on tricky tracks, and race to the finish while exploring fun, colorful worlds. Play solo to sharpen your skills or compete with friends to see who’s the ultimate driver. Unlock awesome vehicles like monster trucks, toy cars, and race cars along the way. Ready to drift, jump, and conquer the road? How to play Obby Roads? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or the left and right arrow keys Jump: the space bar Who created Obby Roads? Obby Roads is created by Tall Team. Play their other games on Poki: Smash Karts ! How can I play Obby Roads for free? You can play Obby Roads for free on Poki. Can I play Obby Roads on mobile devices and desktop? Obby Roads can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Obby Roads with my friend? Yes! Obby Roads is a single or multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
